text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 267 

PRE_ICL_DAYS_INP_2M 

LABEL: Pre-ICL In-Network Pharmacy - days in 2-month supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the number of days in a 2-month supply of a drug on this tier, when using an in-
network pharmacy (INP; also known as a standard retail pharmacy) during the pre-initial coverage 
limit (ICL) phase of the Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME:
